---
title: Gr20
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557429/linoportovecchio_20180821_scgcbu.png
description: Premiere journée du gr20, portrait de L
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2018/08/21
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557429/linoportovecchio_20180821_scgcbu.png)
